revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:String manipulation templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:String manipulation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Delink%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:String manipulation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{High-use}} {{cascade-protected template}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{lua|Module:Delink}} This template removes links from wikitext. It de-links wikilinks and URL links, removes HTML comments, and normalises whitespace. It handles most wikitext correctly, including category links, the [[Help:Colon trick|colon trick]], the [[Help:Pipe trick|pipe trick]] (normal and reverse), nested wikilinks, and invalid link characters. ==Usage== * Basic *: {{tlx|delink|''text''}} * All parameters *: {{delink | 1 = | wikilinks = no | urls = no | comments = no | whitespace = no | refs = yes }} ==Parameters== *1 - the text to be de-linked. *wikilinks *: - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", wikilinks are not de-linked. *: - if set to "target", wikilinks are reduced to the target portion of a wikilink ({{elc|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}|{{vr|{{var|label}}}}}} → {{samp|{{vr|{{var|target}}}}}}) *urls - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", URL links are not de-linked. *comments - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", HTML comments are not removed. *whitespace - if set to "no", "n", "false", or "0", whitespace is not normalised. The normalisation makes the whitespace of the resulting text look as if it had been put through the MediaWiki parser. For example, single newlines are converted to a single space, but double newlines are left alone. *refs - (experimental) if set to "yes", "y", "true", or "1", removes references. This is not recommended, as only the [1], [2], etc. markers will be removed - the references themselves will still appear at the end of the page. There is no known workaround for this problem as of April 2014. ==Examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} | {{delink|[[Foo|Bar]]|wikilinks=target}} |- | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} | {{delink|[[Foo]], [[bar]], and [[baz]].}} |- | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} | {{delink|I visited [https://www.example.com example.com].}} |- | {{delink|Foo}} | {{delink|Foo}} |} ==Non-examples== {| class="wikitable" ! Code ! Output |- | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} | {{delink|https://www.example.com}} |} ==See also== *{{tl|trim brackets}} *{{tl|delink question hyphen-minus}} * {{tl|Linked}} – links if not already linked {{String-handling templates|delink}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:String manipulation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
